data.name: Just Date Goth
data.detailed_description:
Erotic dating sim with hot goth girls. Explore different locations, take on real jobs, and unlock intimate scenes. Enjoy every detail with unique art style and expressive animations.

Explore the dark and alluring world of mysterious goth girls. Each character comes with her own story, problems, and personality. Go on dates, win their trust, help them out, and maybe—just maybe—earn a place in their hearts… and beds.

Immerse yourself in beautifully crafted, sensual in-game scenes. The unique art style blends hand-drawn 2D art with 3D elements for a look that's both stylish and provocative. Every animation is full of emotion, detail, and passion.

Move through various moody and intriguing locations using simple point-and-click mechanics. Discover secrets, find items, and unlock new places as you deepen your connections with the girls.

Take on minigames based on “simple man” jobs like plumbing, wiring, and other hands-on tasks. These fun and light puzzles give you something to master while progressing your story and impressing the girls.

After years in the big city, you return to your hometown to start fresh. What begins as a simple date quickly spirals into a strange and erotic game full of secrets, temptations, and unexpected twists.

Whether you're here for the flirty storylines, the hot animations, or the adult challenges, this game offers a one-of-a-kind erotic experience for players who want more than just eye candy. Dive in, explore, and enjoy every detail.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4130 or AMD (2 cores, 3.4 ГГц) or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GT 630 / 650m, AMD Radeon HD6570 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 Ti / AMD RX 570 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 MB 可用空間
